feedbackHighlights: Workshop exercises were well-structured and achievable
Great speaker chemistry between Sarah and Jordan
Pair programming format helped beginners keep up
improvementAreas: WiFi was slow during the coding exercises — need venue with better bandwidth
Some exercises were too long — consider shorter, more focused tasks
More time for Q&A between exercises
lessonsLearned: Workshop format works best with 2 main speakers + floating mentors
WiFi bandwidth is critical for coding workshops — test beforehand
35/40 attendance suggests our estimates are slightly optimistic — plan for 85% show rate
nextEventSuggestions: Follow-up: Advanced RAG with multi-modal retrieval
Consider Downtown Tech Hub for better WiFi infrastructure
Shorten exercises to 20 min max with 5 min debrief after each
